description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton-polyester fabric and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this T-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this devilish print tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.
